subject: Sharon Springs subdivision research
description: Identified Sharon Springs as high-priority neighborhood. 15 homes built 2005-2007. Water heaters and HVAC systems approaching end of life. HOA appears active with regular meetings.

subject: Introduction email to Sharon Springs HOA
description: Sent introductory email to Maria Garcia, Sharon Springs HOA President, explaining HomeSync group maintenance services and potential cost savings for the neighborhood.

subject: Castleberry HVAC project status update
description: Called Priya Patel to discuss HVAC replacement project timeline. She confirmed 12 homeowners have signed up so far. Discussed extending sign-up deadline to April 15.

subject: Contractor pricing confirmation
description: Confirmed group pricing of $4,200 per unit with Billy Harper at North Georgia HVAC. He can start installations May 1 and complete all 25 homes by end of June.

subject: Follow-up call with Maria Garcia
description: Maria expressed interest in group maintenance programs. She mentioned several homeowners have been complaining about HVAC issues. Scheduled a meeting for next week.

subject: Initial outreach to Windermere HOA
description: Sent introductory email to Robert Thompson at Windermere Community Association. Highlighted upcoming maintenance needs based on 2010-2012 build dates.

subject: Pressure washing project completion
description: Tyler Barrett and his team completed pressure washing for all 15 homes in Sharon Springs. Every homeowner satisfied with results. Great testimonials collected.

subject: Thank you and feedback request
description: Sent thank you email to Jose Martinez and other Sharon Springs homeowners who participated in pressure washing project. Requested reviews and referrals.

subject: Bridgetown HOA board meeting
description: Attended Bridgetown HOA board meeting. Presented maintenance forecasting data showing HVAC systems are 17-19 years old. Board very receptive to group buying concept.

subject: Bridgetown HVAC group replacement pitch
description: Formal pitch to Bridgetown HOA for HVAC group replacement. Presented savings analysis: $1,800 per home, $45,000 total for subdivision. Board requested proposal document.

subject: Windermere HOA response
description: Robert Thompson returned call. Interested but cautious. Wants to understand how the group pricing model works. Suggested I send more details via email.

subject: Homeowner interest in Bridgetown
description: Jennifer Adams called after hearing about the program at the HOA meeting. Her HVAC is original from 2008 and making noises. Very interested in group replacement.

subject: Castleberry HVAC sign-up reminder
description: Sent reminder email to Priya Patel with updated sign-up flyer for distribution. Currently at 12 sign-ups, goal is 20 by April 15 deadline.

subject: Castleberry homeowner sign-up
description: Sanjay Gupta called to sign up for HVAC replacement. His unit is from 2004 and efficiency has dropped significantly. Walked him through the process and pricing.

subject: Windermere maintenance analysis
description: Sent detailed maintenance analysis to Robert Thompson showing water heater and exterior paint timelines for Windermere homes. Proposed informational session at next HOA meeting.

subject: Lanier Springs HOA approval meeting
description: Met with Wei Chen and Lanier Springs board. They approved HomeSync as preferred group maintenance coordinator. Younger neighborhood but proactive approach appreciated.

subject: Bridgetown HVAC proposal document
description: Sent formal proposal to David Mitchell for Bridgetown HVAC group replacement program. Includes contractor qualifications, timeline, pricing, and homeowner agreement template.

subject: Contractor site visit - Castleberry
description: Accompanied Billy Harper on site visits to 3 Castleberry homes for pre-installation assessments. All standard installations, no complications expected.

subject: Painting contractor quote for Bridgetown
description: Called Fernando Torres at Precision Paint Georgia to discuss potential exterior painting group project for Bridgetown. Got preliminary quote of $3,150 per home for groups of 10+.

subject: Sharon Springs HVAC planning meeting
description: Met with Maria Garcia to discuss HVAC replacement as next project after successful pressure washing. She will survey homeowners about interest level at next monthly meeting.

subject: Castleberry HVAC sign-ups at 12
description: Updated project status: 12 homes signed up for Castleberry HVAC replacement. 13 more eligible. Push for additional sign-ups before April 15 deadline.

subject: Lanier Springs welcome packet
description: Sent welcome packet to Kenji Tanaka and other Lanier Springs homeowners introducing HomeSync services. Included maintenance timeline showing their homes will need water heaters in 2-3 years.

subject: Bridgetown proposal follow-up
description: Called David Mitchell to follow up on the HVAC proposal. Board is reviewing and will vote at their April 10 meeting. He is personally supportive and optimistic about approval.

subject: Plumbing contractor for Sharon Springs water heaters
description: Spoke with Carlos Ramirez about potential water heater replacement project for Sharon Springs. He quoted $1,203 per unit for groups of 10+. Available starting Q3 2026.

subject: Windermere homeowner interest check
description: Ashley Walker mentioned at neighborhood gathering that several Windermere homeowners are interested in group maintenance. Suggested organizing an info session at the clubhouse.
